name: main-push-scope-merge-exempt
title: Exempt PR merge commits from the main-push scope guard
description: check-main-push-scope.sh fails on every non-chore PR merge commit (its diff = whole PR), turning main CI red since #97 and blocking auto-tag (v0.10.0/v0.10.1 untagged). Exempt 2-parent merge commits.
creator: sdelmas
